name: Resveratrol
description: A powerful polyphenol that protects against environmental stressors and slows down aging.
scientificSummary: A natural phytoalexin produced by several plants in response to injury or when the plant is under attack by pathogens such as bacteria or fungi.
mechanismOfAction: Activates sirtuins (longevity genes) and neutralizes free radicals to protect skin structure.

seo.title: Resveratrol - The Longevity Antioxidant | Dew Theory
seo.description: Protect your skin from the signs of aging with the powerful antioxidant Resveratrol.
